title: The Terrors Beneath
description: Even your house can't protect you from what's beneath.
body:
Even your house can't protect you from what's beneath.

This is a modpack I made for me and my friends, and I think It turned out pretty well so I've decided to publish It.

**I DO NOT RECOMMEND YOU PLAYING THIS MODPACK WITH EPILEPSY!!!**

There are 3 main horror mods in the modpack:
**Evil Hunter,**
**flywheel of terror,**
**From The Caves**

The Modpack also has **e4mc** so you can play with your friends!

There is also a Resource Pack that makes the game look like alpha Minecraft called: **Acraft**

All the mods that are used in the modpack:

3D Skin Layers,
Architectury API,
Camerapture,
chat heads,
Cloth Config API,
Collective,
CreativeCore,
e4mc,
EnhancedVisuals,
Entity Culling,
Evil Hunter,
FerriteCore,
flywheel of terror,
Fog Overrides,
From The Caves,
Geckolib,
Hide Experimental Warning,
Immersive Overlays,
Just Enough Items,
ModernFix,
Ok Zoomer,
Searchables,
Simple Voice Chat,
Sound Physics Remastered,
